1806560.name: Simplified Launch
1806560.description:
Simplified Launch is a tool designed to help organize and improve your desktop experience. It's essentially a container for your games, applications and files. Drag-drop almost anything to the application and categorize and sort in a way that makes the most sense for you. And of course, you can launch anything from within Simplified Launch. Finally you can have a clean desktop and don't have to worry about trying to find something deep within folder structures.

Features
- Add any file, game, folder or application
- Sorting, filtering and adding favorites
- Create multiple profiles
- Built in ToDo list
- Themes
